Settings.Name: GeneralColor1
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for most white or light-colored text/icon foreground elements. Also the default white or light background color for most standard UI elements.

Settings.Name: GeneralColor2
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for sidebar and section backgrounds; along with text filed, floor plan filters, and "static/zero" counter background colors.

Settings.Name: GeneralColor3
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for disabled, "no" Favorites, and Toggled "off" states. Also for POI temporary "searched" marker, and minor sub-section text title colors.

Settings.Name: GeneralColor4
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Default color for the Navigation Menu Tile and PIN Pad Title background colors.

Settings.Name: BackgroundColor1
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Affects sidebar header and pull-tab; floor plan card neighborhood label; modals, overlays, and alert windows; small gallery header title; brochure item headers

Settings.Name: ForegroundColor1
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for text and icons that will display on top of Background 1

Settings.Name: BackgroundColor2
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Affects the sidebar content area and other main section backgrounds along with the general text input, static/"zero" counter, and brochure favorited sidebar meta/info backgrounds

Settings.Name: ForegroundColor2
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for text and icons that will display on top of Background 2

Settings.Name: BackgroundColor3
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Affects the home navigation's utility (Zoom and Offline) and Quick-nav's secondary menu slide closed button

Settings.Name: ForegroundColor3
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for text and icons that will display on top of Background 3

Settings.Name: BackgroundColor4
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Affects POI distance text, floor plan meta icons, Inventory Home highlight

Settings.Name: ForegroundColor4
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for text and icons that will display on top of Background 4

Settings.Name: BackgroundColor5
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Establishes the general disabled/off state color. Also affects general small element titles (example: the Elevations title within the floor plan favorites accordion)

Settings.Name: ForegroundColor5
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for text and icons that will display on top of Background 5

Settings.Name: BackgroundColor6
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Affects text inputs, accordions (including brochure favorites), drop-downs, interactive tools, floor plan cards, and Custom Page Nav Section content area backgrounds

Settings.Name: ForegroundColor6
Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Used for text and icons that will display on top of Background 6

Settings.Name: FavoritesInactiveColor

Settings.Name: BackgroundColor7

Settings.Name: ForegroundColor7

These settings can be found under Theme: Title Icon Background Color and Title Icon Foreground Color. These settings also affect the main section sidebar title icons to retain UI/UX continuity throughout the presentation.

Settings.HelpText: Override default: Register label on homepage. Max 32 characters

Settings.Name: PopupHomeBuyerRegistrationOnFirstTouch
Settings.PublicName: Popup Home Buyer registration on first touch?
Settings.HelpText: When the use makes their first touch anywhere on the page the Home Buyer registration modal will pop up. They can either register or close the modal. This will block navigation to a different page.

Settings.Name: SecondaryWelcomeText
Settings.HelpText: This will display in its own block under the main welcome modal.

Settings.HelpText: The marker image for search result POIs on the area map.

Settings.HelpText: Select to enable the search feature

Settings.FieldDataOptions: Fit all markers in view|Focus on community marker

Settings.HelpText: The marker size for POIs

Settings.HelpText: The marker size for the community POI

Settings.HelpText: Text used for the Lot Reservation About dialog. Available variables: {{lotName}}, {{neighborhoodName}}, {{communityName}}, {{clientName}}

Settings.HelpText: Text used for the Lot Watch dialog

Settings.Name: LotWatchEmailText
Settings.Value: {{lotName}} in {{neighborhoodName}} has been updated to the {{statusName}} status.
Settings.HelpText: Text used for the Lot Watch email. Available variables: {{lotName}}, {{neighborhoodName}}, {{statusName}}

Settings.Name: EnableLotWatch
Settings.HelpText: The watch button will appear for all lots that are not in the final status. Standalone ISM only.

Settings.Name: EnableLotReserve
Settings.HelpText: The reserve button will appear for all available lots. Requires integration with client's website. Standalone ISM only.

Settings.Name: SiteMapShowReg
Settings.HelpText: Enables the registration form for the standalone site map

Settings.Name: LotMapCustomData
Settings.HelpText: Add fields for custom data to be displayed

Settings.Name: LotTagFilterTitle
Settings.HelpText: The text to display in the accordion header of the tag filter

Settings.Name: CommunityMapSideMenuOpenByDefault
Settings.HelpText: Changes whether the side menu is open by default on the neighborhood map page.

Settings.Name: SideMenuOpenByDefaultForStandalone
Settings.PublicName: Side Menu Open by Default for Standalone ISM
Settings.HelpText: Changes whether the side menu is open by default on the standalone ISM page.

Settings.Name: DisablePOIBusiness
Settings.HelpText: Disable Point of Interest pins on all Google Maps for surrounding businesses.

Settings.Name: ExternalUrlButtonName
Settings.HelpText: Name displayed within External URL button in the Lot Details.

Settings.Name: LotMapAdditionalFields
Settings.HelpText: Add additional core lot fields

Settings.Name: EnableCommunityMapPrint
Settings.HelpText: Whether printing is enabled for the community map

Settings.Name: CommunitySideMenuHidden
Settings.HelpText: Changes whether the side menu is hidden by default on the community map page.

Settings.Name: CalculateTotalCost
Settings.PublicName: Calculate Total Cost instead of using Total Cost field
Settings.HelpText: Calculate Total Cost from Cost, Premium, and Options Premium rather than directly from Total Cost field.

Settings.Name: HideUnusedLotStatuses
Settings.HelpText: Hide any lot statuses that have no lots assigned

Settings.Name: EnableSiteMapPrintCustomZoom
Settings.PublicName: Enable Site Map Print Custom Zoom?
Settings.HelpText: This features gives the user the ability to zoom & pan the map to a specific area for printing.

Settings.Name: PersistLotStatusColors
Settings.HelpText: Persist the lot status colors on the map.

Settings.Name: ReserveNowButtonText
Settings.HelpText: Text for the lot's Reserve Now button

Settings.Name: WatchLotButtonText
Settings.HelpText: Text for the lot's Watch Lot button. Available variables: {{lotLabel}}

Settings.Name: UnwatchLotButtonText
Settings.HelpText: Text for the lot's Unwatch Lot button. Available variables: {{lotLabel}}

Settings.Name: RequireSalesRepForInteraction
Settings.HelpText: Requires a sales representative to be logged in before the user can interact with the page

Settings.Name: HideLotsWithUnavailableInternalStatus
Settings.PublicName: Hide Lots with Unavailable Internal Status?
Settings.HelpText: Hides the text displayed inside of a Lot svg.

Settings.Name: PrintSelectedStatusesOnly
Settings.HelpText: When enabled then only the statuses toggled on will appear in the legend on the print brochure.

Settings.Name: CommunityMapHotspotMediaDisplay
Settings.FieldDataOptions: Actual Size With White Space|Full Screen
Settings.HelpText: Select how to display hotspot media. Full screen image should be 1920x1080. Full screen images could be cut off around the edges if not sized properly.

Settings.Name: CommunityMapHotspotMediaHideCarouselUI
Settings.HelpText: Hides the gallery carousel controls and count on hotspot media.

Settings.Name: EnableWheelZoomOnMapSvg
Settings.PublicName: Enable mouse wheel zoom on map svg
Settings.HelpText: Enables mouse wheel zoom functionality on the map when Google maps overlay is not used.

Settings.Name: SetStatusColorInSymbolOnly
Settings.PublicName: Set status color in lot symbol only?
Settings.HelpText: The statuses color will fill only the dot symbol inside the lot inside of the usual full art.

Settings.Name: ShowMapPanArrows
Settings.HelpText: Displays arrow controls for map position in the lower right corner of the map.

Settings.Name: HideUnavailableInternalStatusesFromLegend
Settings.PublicName: Hide Unavailable internal statuses from legend
Settings.HelpText: Hides any status with the internal status type of "Unavailable" from the legend.

Settings.Name: CommunityMapTagFilterPlaceholderText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed in the dropdown placeholder of the Tag Filter.

Settings.Name: GroupStatusesByInternalStatusType
Settings.PublicName: Group Statuses by Internal Status Type.
Settings.HelpText: Groups Statuses with the same Internal Status Type into a collapsable menu using the Internal Status Type as the menu title.

Settings.Name: LotStatusesToAlwaysDisplay
Settings.PublicName: Lot Statuses to always display in menu
Settings.HelpText: List statuses that should always display in the menu, even if using the Hide Unused Lot Statuses setting and it has zero mapped lots.

Settings.Name: CommunityMapDefaultMarkerSize
Settings.HelpText: The marker size for neighborhood PINs

Settings.Name: EnableMyLocationFeature
Settings.HelpText: When enabled a quick tool button will appear that allows the user to toggle tracking of their current location and displays a marker on the map.

Settings.Name: EnableMapRotationControls
Settings.HelpText: When enabled the map wil have the ability to be rotated.

Settings.Name: UseStaticStatusLegend
Settings.HelpText: Hides interactive legend and filters and displays a smaller static status legend.

Settings.Name: OptionsAndFeatures
Settings.HelpText: Show list of options or description for floorplan?

Settings.Name: Enable Floorplan Print
Settings.HelpText: Select to enable floorplan printing

Settings.Name: Display Elevations
Settings.FieldDataOptions: Actual Size With White Space|Full Screen
Settings.HelpText: Select how to display elevations. Full screen image should be 1920x1080. Full screen images could be cut off around the edges if not sized properly.

Settings.Name: IHSortOrder
Settings.HelpText: Determines whether Inventory Homes are shown first or last

Settings.Name: FPListBackground
Settings.HelpText: Background color of the floorplan list page

Settings.Name: IFPBackground
Settings.HelpText: Background color of the floorplan page

Settings.Name: InfoDescTitle
Settings.HelpText: Custom text for the Options and Features dropdown

Settings.Name: ShowMediaInGallery

Settings.HelpText: Includes floor plan media (i.e. interiors) in galleries on the Floor Plan List Page when turned on

Settings.Name: FloorPlansSideMenuOpenByDefault
Settings.HelpText: Changes whether the side menu is open by default on floorplan list page.

Settings.Name: DetailsCollapsed
Settings.HelpText: This will collapse the floorplan card options

Settings.Name: GalleryFavButtonPlacement
Settings.HelpText: Which side of the gallery the favorite button will be placed

Settings.Name: ShowNeighborhoodLabelIcon
Settings.HelpText: Whether the icon is shown in the neighborhood label on the floor plan cards

Settings.Name: SmallGalleryWideScreenLetterbox

Settings.Name: FloorPlanTagFilterTitle
Settings.HelpText: The text to display in the accordion header of the tag filter

Settings.Name: ShowFloorPlanPricing
Settings.HelpText: This setting will show/hide the overall FP pricing.

Settings.Name: AnimateHotspotsOnLoad
Settings.HelpText: Enables a pulsing animaton on the hotspots when the flooplan loads for the first time.

Settings.Name: FloorplanTagFilterPlaceholderText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed in the dropdown placeholder of the Tag Filter.

Settings.Name: IncludeCurrentPlanInCompareMenu
Settings.PublicName: Include current plan in compare menu?
Settings.HelpText: The currently viewed floor plan will be included in the menu so a user can have the same plan side-by-side in the compare view.

Settings.Name: OnlyShowInventoryHomesOnListPage
Settings.PublicName: Only show Inventory Homes on the Floor Plan List page.
Settings.HelpText: Hides all base Floor Plan cards and only displays Inventory Home cards on the list page.

Settings.Name: HideStandardOptionsHighlight
Settings.HelpText: Use this to prevent the option from appearing highlighted once it has been made standard to the plan.

Settings.Name: HideFloorplanQuickToolsMenu
Settings.HelpText: When selected the Quick Tools menu will be hidden on the Floor Plan page.

Settings.Name: HideUnusedFloorplanFilters
Settings.HelpText: Hides Floor Plan filters in the menu that do not have any filterable content.

Settings.Name: ShowVisualizerButton
Settings.PublicName: Show Visualizer button in side menu
Settings.HelpText: Shows a link to the Visualizer tab in FP menu when a Visualizer is present and plan name is found to match.

Settings.Name: StatusesToHideLotsFromDropdown
Settings.PublicName: Statuses to hide mapped lots in dropdown
Settings.HelpText: List the statuses for hiding mapped lots from the FP card dropdown.

Settings.Name: IncludeBasementInFloorCount
Settings.HelpText: When counting floors, basement will be included.

Settings.Name: ShowMeasureToolWhileCompare
Settings.PublicName: Show measuring tool while comparing plans?

Settings.Name: ShowBrochureTitle
Settings.HelpText: Shows the brochure title.

Settings.Name: ShowCommunityName
Settings.HelpText: Shows the community name on the brochure.

Settings.Name: ShowCommunityAddress
Settings.HelpText: Shows the community address on the brochure.

Settings.Name: HeaderFooterBackground
Settings.HelpText: The color used as the background color for the brochure.

Settings.Name: ShowSalesRepInfo
Settings.HelpText: Shows the sales representative's info on the brochure.

Settings.Name: EnableBrochureFooter
Settings.HelpText: Enables the footer on the brochure.

Settings.Name: BrochureFooterTitle
Settings.HelpText: Title of the footer in the brochure.

Settings.Name: BrochureFooterText
Settings.Value: Thank you so much for stopping by today. We hope that you found everything you and your family want and need in a new home. This personalized brochure is just for you to recap your favorites from today's visit.
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed in the brochure's footer.

Settings.Name: ShareEmailText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed in the share email. Use {{communityName}} anywhere you want the community name to be inserted.

Settings.Name: HeaderFooterColor
Settings.HelpText: Foreground color of footer

Settings.Name: IfpDisclaimerEnabled
Settings.HelpText: Shows IFP disclaimer in footer

Settings.Name: ExteriorDisclaimerEnabled
Settings.HelpText: Shows Exterior disclaimer in footer

Settings.Name: VisualizerDisclaimerEnabled
Settings.HelpText: Shows Visualizer disclaimer in footer

Settings.Name: PoiDisclaimerEnabled
Settings.HelpText: Shows POI disclaimer in footer

Settings.Name: CustomTemplateItemDisclaimerEnabled
Settings.PublicName: Disclaimer Shown For Custom Template Items?
Settings.HelpText: Shows disclaimer for items from custom templates in footer.

Settings.Name: IfpDisclaimerText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed for Interactive Floorplan disclaimer. Available variables: {{currentYear}}

Settings.Name: ExteriorDisclaimerText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed for Exterior disclaimer. Available variables: {{currentYear}}

Settings.Name: VisualizerDisclaimerText
Settings.Value: All images, renderings, illustrations, depictions, and other information provided on this website are intended solely for illustrative purposes only, and no representation is made or implied as to the accuracy, correctness, completeness, and/or availability of the same. Actual subdivision and home specifications (including, without limitation, amenities, elevations, dimensions, materials, finishes, options, upgrades, color schemes, and other features) and the availability thereof will vary based upon the chosen subdivision, plan or plan series, lot, elevation, options, upgrades, and other relevant variables, all of which are subject to change at any time without notice. Purchasers are responsible for confirming all relevant information prior to contracting. Please consult your contracting documents or reach out to a friendly Stone Martin Sales Professional today with any questions or concerns concerning any specific home or offering.
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed for Visualizer disclaimer. Available variables: {{currentYear}}

Settings.Name: PoiDisclaimerText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed for Points of Interest disclaimer. Available variables: {{currentYear}}

Settings.Name: CustomTemplateItemDisclaimerText
Settings.PublicName: Disclaimer Text For Custom Template Items
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed for custom template items disclaimer. These are items from your saved templates. Available variables: {{currentYear}}

Settings.Name: DisclaimerImage1
Settings.HelpText: First image displayed in disclaimer.

Settings.Name: DisclaimerImage2
Settings.HelpText: Second image displayed in disclaimer.

Settings.Name: DisclaimerImage3
Settings.HelpText: Third image displayed in disclaimer.

Settings.Name: MaxFavoritesLimitFloorPlansAndInventoryHomes

Settings.HelpText: Shows disclaimer for Lots.

Settings.Name: LotDisclaimerText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed for Lot (or custom name for Lots) disclaimer. Available variables: {{currentYear}}

Settings.Name: ShareEmailLinkText
Settings.Value: Click here to go to brochure.

Settings.Name: ShowEntireSitemap
Settings.HelpText: Enabling this will include the entire sitemap image in addition to the zoomed in lot sections.

Settings.Name: EnableFloorplanGrouping

Settings.HelpText: Enabling this will display the associated neighborhood's name when displaying the floorplan name.

Settings.Name: MarketingPdfs

Settings.Name: ShareEmailSubjectLineText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed in share email subject.  Use {{communityName}} anywhere you want the community name to be inserted.

Settings.Name: EnergyEfficiencyHotspotRadius
Settings.HelpText: Include the unit "px" or "%"

Settings.Value: All images, renderings, illustrations, depictions, and other information provided on this website are intended solely for illustrative purposes only, and no representation is made or implied as to the accuracy, correctness, completeness, and/or availability of the same. Actual subdivision and home specifications (including, without limitation, amenities, elevations, dimensions, materials, finishes, options, upgrades, color schemes, and other features) and the availability thereof will vary based upon the chosen subdivision, plan or plan series, lot, elevation, options, upgrades, and other relevant variables, all of which are subject to change at any time without notice. Purchasers are responsible for confirming all relevant information prior to contracting. Please consult your contracting documents or reach out to a friendly Stone Martin Sales Professional today with any questions or concerns concerning any specific home or offering.

Settings.Name: MobileVisualizerZoom
Settings.HelpText: On page load zoom level. Valid range between 100 - 250

Settings.Name: PrintVisualizerImageFit
Settings.HelpText: Setting to contain will ensure the whole image is displayed but could possibly add white space around the image.

Settings.Name: HideCommunityNameInHeader
Settings.HelpText: Applies only to the Standalone Visualizer. When enabled, the community name will not appear in the header.

Settings.Name: UniversalLotDisclaimerText
Settings.HelpText: Text displayed for Lot (or custom name for Lots) disclaimer.

Settings.Name: PrintFooterDisclaimer
Settings.HelpText: This text will display at the bottom of the page underneath map content.

Settings.Name: PrintFinalPageDisclaimer
Settings.HelpText: This text will display as its own page at the end of the print trailer.

Settings.Name: FloorplanOptionsLabel

Settings.Name: CompareMenuLabel

Settings.Name: GoogleApiKey

Settings.HelpText: Color hints: POI Distance text color, Floor plan icons, Inventory Home highlight color.

Settings.HelpText: Color hints: Default POI marker color, hotspots, priority, and PIN Pad buttons color.

Settings.Name: PrimaryFont
Settings.HelpText: The font family to be used; Either a valid Google Font or a custom font that has been added to the code base

Settings.Name: HeaderFont
Settings.HelpText: Slide out menu, home page title, brochure title, etc

Settings.Name: OptionHighlightColor
Settings.HelpText: Highlight color for floor plan options when turned on

Settings.Name: ShowAsGoogleMapOverlay
Settings.PublicName: Show sitemap as an overlay on Google Maps?
Settings.HelpText: This feature will take the regular SVG map and load it on top of Google Maps. It requires a valid API key within the Area Map settings section.

Settings.Name: GoogleSearchRadius
Settings.HelpText: Search radius from the community in miles (max 50)

Settings.Name: FloorPlanLabel
Settings.HelpText: This is the label for "Floor Plan"

Settings.Name: LotLabel
Settings.HelpText: Label for the lots selection

Settings.Name: NeighborhoodLabel
Settings.HelpText: Label for the neighborhoods selection

Settings.Name: CallToActionIcon
Settings.HelpText: Icon used to call attention to lots with the lot's Call To Action Text

Settings.Name: InventoryHomeColor
Settings.HelpText: Banner and icon color when viewing Inventory Homes on Floorplan List and IFP page.

Settings.Name: VideoPlayIcon
Settings.HelpText: Icon used for the video play button

Settings.Name: SuccessIcon
Settings.HelpText: Icon used to indicate a success

Settings.Name: AlertIcon
Settings.HelpText: Icon used to indicate an alert

Settings.HelpText: Name to be used for square feet

Settings.HelpText: Name to be used for outdoor square feet

Settings.HelpText: Icon to display when the accordion is closed and can be opened.

Settings.Name: ChildPlanOptionsDefaultSuppressed
Settings.PublicName: Child plan options default as Suppressed
Settings.HelpText: Options added to a master plan will be set to Suppressed for all children

Settings.Name: ChildPlanElevationsDefaultToHidden

Settings.HelpText: New elevations being added to Master floor plan will be defaulted to hidden on all Child links
